summary: Comprehensive Go-Live QA Testing for LEXA Smart Home Platform completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper content and mobile responsiveness.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (5 requests/minute) - expected behavior for production
Returns 404 - endpoint may not be implemented or has different path

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Failed to fetch' errors for mega menu, packages, and tracking config on initial load. These appear to be React Strict Mode double-invoke effects and don't affect functionality.

issues: Cookie consent modal appears on every page - working as expected

phase_1_performance.details: Homepage DOM loaded in ~1.93s. No major layout shifts detected during scroll testing.

phase_2_mobile_responsiveness.details: Homepage, Project Builder, Contact form all render correctly on mobile (390x844). Mobile menu, WhatsApp CTAs, and navigation all functional.

phase_3_functional_qa_personas.details: Villa owner persona: Cinema solutions available. Commercial persona: Commercial collaboration spaces available. All 5 property types (Villa, Apartment, Penthouse, Townhouse, Commercial) selectable in Project Builder.

phase_4_intelligence_builder.details: Project Builder 9-step flow working. Property type, bedrooms, floors, budget range all selectable. Progress indicator shows correctly on desktop and mobile.

phase_5_forms_lead_capture.details: Contact form: All fields present (name, email, phone, subject, message). Experience Centre booking API working. Consultation booking API working. WhatsApp CTAs present on all tested pages.

phase_6_seo_indexing.details: Sitemap.xml valid with 100+ URLs including all geo pages. robots.txt exists in public folder. Canonical tags present.

phase_7_api_endpoints.details: GET /api/health: 200 OK. GET /api/solutions: 200 OK with solutions list. GET /api/admin/tracking/public/config: 200 OK. POST /api/contact: Working (rate limited). Admin login/verify: Working.

core_pages.notes: Homepage loads with hero, solutions, projects sections
Contact form with all fields, WhatsApp CTA
LEXA PREMIER showroom page with booking

partner_pages.notes: Technical Resources page with Request Resources CTA

action_items: MINOR: Console 'Failed to fetch' errors for mega menu components - consider adding error boundaries or retry logic
MINOR: /api/systems endpoint returns 404 - verify if this endpoint is needed or update documentation
critical_code_review_comments: All 28+ geo pages have proper location-specific content and SEO metadata
Project Builder 9-step flow is well-structured with clear progress indicators
WhatsApp integration working across all service pages
Cookie consent modal properly implemented with Essential/Analytics/Marketing options
Mobile responsiveness is excellent - all tested pages render correctly on 390x844 viewport
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions and booking requests created with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Go-Live QA completed successfully. All 7 phases tested. Backend APIs working. Frontend pages loading correctly on desktop and mobile. WhatsApp integration working. Project Builder 9-step flow functional. 28+ geo pages verified. Admin login working with credentials admin/lexa2026.

tracking_pixels.notes: Tracking config endpoint returns empty config - tracking pixel IDs not yet entered in admin panel (expected per requirements)
